title: OptiPerformer
description: A Lightweight & Overly-Optimized Modpack For Potato PCs!
body:
Why Was This Modpack Created
-
- This Modpack Was Mainly Created Because There Weren't Good Enough Performance Modpacks, Some Of The **Notable** Performance Modpacks Weren't Really Good Or Straight Up Doesnt Work!
 (Expect Slow Updates/Backports)
---
Useful Game Settings
-
- **VSync** Is Set To: **OFF**
- **Frame Rate** Is Locked On: **60**
- **Animations** Are Set To: **OFF**
- **Particles** Are Set To: **Minimal/OFF**
- **Graphics** Is Set To: **Fast**
- **Fog** Is Set To: **OFF**
- **Music** Is Set To: **OFF**
